builder.shell.title: Homework Builder

builder.dashboard.workspace.title: Active homework sets
builder.dashboard.workspace.subtitle: Continue editing, publish, grade, and bring Michael in when a task should be accelerated.
builder.dashboard.status.upcoming: Published but not yet open to students
builder.dashboard.error: Failed to load homework sets. Please try again.
builder.dashboard.card.aiBody: Generate SQL solutions for drafted questions automatically before review or publishing.
builder.dashboard.ai.title: Let Michael handle parts of the prep
builder.dashboard.ai.subtitle: This uses the API capabilities already in the system and fits best once a draft is in place.
builder.dashboard.ai.bullet.question: Turn a rough homework idea into a clearer assignment structure.
builder.dashboard.ai.bullet.solution: Generate SQL solutions for existing questions through the API.
builder.dashboard.ai.bullet.review: Reduce manual prep time before publishing and grading.
builder.dashboard.ai.ctaCreate: Create a homework set to start with Michael
builder.dashboard.ai.noop: There are no new questions that need solutions right now.
builder.dashboard.ai.error: Michael could not complete the request. Try again.
builder.dashboard.empty.title: No homework sets yet
builder.dashboard.empty.message: Start by creating a new assignment and drafting ten SQL questions.
